name: Quality Metrics & KPIs Definition
description: Quality metrics and KPIs for radiology workflow performance tracking

turnaroundTime.name: Report Turnaround Time
turnaroundTime.description: Time from study completion to preliminary report availability

criticalResultsCommunication.name: Critical Results Communication Compliance
criticalResultsCommunication.description: Percentage of critical results properly communicated within required timeframe

addendumRate.name: Addendum Rate
addendumRate.description: Percentage of reports requiring addenda after finalization

clinicalCorrection.description: Addendum due to clinical information change

peerReview.description: Addendum due to peer review findings

discrepancyRate.name: Discrepancy Rate
discrepancyRate.description: Rate of discrepancies between preliminary and final reports

minor.description: Minor discrepancy not affecting patient care

criticalFindingRate.name: Critical Finding Detection Rate
criticalFindingRate.description: Percentage of studies with critical findings

templateUtilization.name: Template Utilization Rate
templateUtilization.description: Percentage of reports using structured templates

radpeerScoreDistribution.name: RADPEER Score Distribution
radpeerScoreDistribution.description: Distribution of RADPEER scores across peer-reviewed studies

author: RadReport Templates
